name: ImplicitRDP: An End-to-End Visual-Force Diffusion Policy with Structural Slow-Fast Learning

description: arXiv:2512.10946v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Human-level contact-rich manipulation relies on the distinct roles of two key modalities: vision provides spatially rich but temporally slow global context, while force sensing captures rapid local contact dynamics. Integrating these signals is challenging due to their fundamental frequency and informational disparities. In this work, we...
author: Wendi Chen, Han Xue, Yi Wang, Fangyuan Zhou, Jun Lv, Yang Jin, Shirun Tang, Chuan Wen, Cewu Lu
